response.justification: Strong senior IC with broad full-stack and open-source experience (notably GISCollective, Linux, DLang, Node.js) and clear interest in OSS. However, the role is executive-level Head of Development requiring formal leadership of teams, architectural ownership at scale, UML proficiency, and German at C1 — the candidate lists only basic German and shows limited explicit team-management or formal architecture/UML experience, which are hard blockers for this specific position.
strengths: Deep open-source and Linux/Unix background, including founding and running GISCollective
Broad polyglot full-stack experience across web, mobile, embedded, and high-throughput systems
Demonstrated mentoring/teaching via workshops, dojos, and Selenium course delivery
concerns: German listed as 'Basic' — far below the required C1 threshold
No explicit Head-of-Development / formal people-management track record
UML and formal architecture/requirements-management experience not evidenced
